proofTarget.description: Synthetic lifecycle task aggregate used to prove canonical slice creation and architecture factory operations.

dbAdminReference.purpose: Capability reference for drizzle-kit migration aggregation, generated migration artifacts, admin DB access, and live repository integration tests.

proofStages.description: Config, tables, db-admin migration target, live Drizzle repository implementation, and slice Layer proof.
HTTP, RPC, and AI tool declarations plus server handler proof.
Client facade, UI surface, and synthetic app contract harness proof.

commandGroup.name: beep architecture
commandGroup.conflictPolicy: skip identical targets, apply structured idempotent updates, fail on differing existing source files

verification.description: Focused operation-plan, wrapper, writer, and idempotency tests.
Runtime and type tests for the staged architecture-lab WorkItem proof.
Generate the staged proof shape into a temp fixture, compare it to the accepted shape, and prove repeat apply is a no-op.
Drizzle-kit migration generation/execution proof and live WorkItem repository tests, skipped cleanly unless test database settings are enabled.
Search audit proving fixture-lab/Specimen is not active canonical guidance.
Attempt check, lint, test, docgen, and full audit once the replacement is coherent.

v1Closure.planSchemaEvolutionPolicy: v1 permits additive optional metadata and behavior already accepted or ignored by the v1 executor only when existing v1 fixtures still decode and replay identically; new actionable architecture operation variants require architecture-operation-plan/v2 unless a documented v1 capability-extension rule proves both old-plan replay and new-plan compatibility across supported executors; breaking structural or semantic changes require v2 alongside v1 with the repo deprecation window.
closureScope: modularize current repo-cli architecture operation-plan internals
run comprehensive quality review fix loop over initiative docs and touched code paths
futureExtensionPoints: richer structured and semantic writer primitives

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
completionGate.grandfatheredNote: Completion predates the 2026-06-30 PR-mergeable gate (lifecycle 'v1-closed'); not reopened.
